items.name: Overseer Cape
items.description: This cape is shrouded in mystery, with deep, matte black fabric adorned with glowing green accents. Intricate patterns and symbols hint at ancient, hidden knowledge, reminiscent of Illuminati secrets. Glowing green veins and runes softly pulse, suggesting a connection to otherworldly powers. Its tattered edges and mystical designs evoke an enigmatic, dark fantasy allure.

items.name: Red Dragon
items.description: visit us for more cool stuf! https://www.roblox.com/groups/34376130/Metaskins-Creations-UGC#!/store Roar into Adventure with the Dino Rider Costume! Unleash your inner dino-rider with this epic dinosaur costume! Perfect for those who love dinosaurs and riding adventures, this costume lets you become a brave explorer on the back of a mighty dino! Realistic Design: Looks like you’re riding a huge dino with your chest and head visible! Fun and Playful: Ideal for Roblox adventures, role-playing, and making friends laugh! Comfortable Fit: Designed to keep you comfy while you embark on your dino quests. Get ready to roar, explore, and make unforgettable memories with your new dino buddy! Perfect for any dino-loving Robloxian!
